policy_questions.question: Does Article 11 of the 2025 Expense Reimbursement Policy define split reimbursement, and what are the criteria?
criteria: 同一费用类型 (same expense type)
7天内2笔及以上 (2+ records within 7 days)
合计金额达到较高审批线 (combined amount reaches higher approval tier)

policy_questions.question: What are the approval tier thresholds per the Authorization Management Policy?

data_questions.question: What are the details of R004212 and R004213 (same employee, same expense type, within 7 days)?
Does the combined amount (10200) trigger a higher approval tier than the individual amounts (5100 each)?
data_questions.conclusion: Split evades 部门总经理 approval

evidence_requirements: Record details for R004212 and R004213
Invoice usage verification for both invoices

reasons: Threshold comparison required against AR tiers

subagent_plan.reason: Single rule, two records, straightforward threshold comparison. Compact mode sufficient.

stopping_conditions: All split reimbursement criteria are verified or refuted

preliminary_finding.description: E0009 split a single lodging expense across two records (R004212 and R004213) within 5 days, both travel_lodging at 5100 each, total 10200 evading AR-03 approval tier
